name: Github Privileged Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects privileged github accounts missing MFA protections.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name FROM github_organization_members u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.site_admin, false) = true OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND COALESCE(u.two_factor_enabled, false) = false
remediation: Immediately enforce MFA on privileged identities and suspend privileged actions until compliant.
